basic_details.job_title: Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Annamalai University has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Assistant - I Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 16-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First class M.Sc. or M.Phil. in Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Microbiology / Life Sciences from recognized University
qualification.details: First class in M.Sc. or M. Phil. in Biochemistry, Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Life Sciences from a recognized University. Desirable Qualifications: Experience in Bioinformatics and cloning techniques.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Annamalai University Project Assistant - I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Annamalai University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Annamalai University Project Assistant - I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant - I position at Annamalai University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Assistant - I post is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant - I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First class M.Sc. or M.Phil. degree in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Microbiology, or Life Sciences from a recognized university. Experience in Bioinformatics and cloning techniques is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant - I position is 30 years. There is no mention of minimum age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant - I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month for the Project Assistant - I position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant - I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant - I position at Annamalai University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Project Assistant - I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant - I position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant - I position will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable qualifications for the Project Assistant - I role?
faq.answer: Candidates with experience in Bioinformatics and cloning techniques are considered desirable for the Project Assistant - I position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. Please check the provided links for direct access.
